tasks.name: Project Setup and File Structure
tasks.description: Create the root directory and all required empty files as per the architecture.

tasks.name: HTML Base Structure and Semantic Markup
tasks.description: Write the core HTML5 skeleton for index.html, including all semantic sections (header, main, footer) and placeholder content.

tasks.name: Core CSS Reset and Base Styles
tasks.description: Define CSS reset, global typography, color variables, and base layout styles for all screen sizes (mobile-first).

tasks.name: Populate Snack Data and Content
tasks.description: Fill the HTML with detailed content for at least 5 Wuhan snacks, including titles, descriptions, and image placeholder markup.

tasks.name: Implement Snack Grid Layout
tasks.description: Style the snacks section using CSS Grid to create a responsive card layout for the snack items.

tasks.name: Style Header and Navigation
tasks.description: Apply CSS to style the page header, site title, and any navigation elements for all viewports.

tasks.name: Style Footer and Final Touches
tasks.description: Apply CSS to style the page footer and add any final global stylistic details.

tasks.name: Implement Responsive Media Queries
tasks.description: Add media queries for tablet (768px) and desktop (1024px) breakpoints to refine the layout and typography.

tasks.name: Cross-browser and Accessibility Review
tasks.description: Validate HTML/CSS, test keyboard navigation, ensure image alt text is present, and verify responsive behavior.

notes: Tasks T2, T3, T6, and T7 can be developed in parallel after initial setup (T1). T5 (Grid Layout) depends on base styles and content being in place. T8 (Responsive) is the final styling integration. T9 is the final validation gate.
